title: Sprint planning
description: Overview of the sprint planning ceremony and how it fits into the OreStudio agile cycle.
blurb: Sprint planning is held at the start of each sprint to select stories from the backlog and agree on a sprint goal.
body_excerpt: The team reviews the product backlog and selects stories that fit within capacity. Each story is broken into tasks. The sprint goal is written as a one-sentence outcome. Planning typically takes one to two hours for a two-week sprint.
